tools.name: forecast.getForecast
tools.description: Get hourly UV Index Forecast by location and date. Optional altitude, ozone level and datetime could be provided.

tools.name: protection.getProtection
tools.description: Get daily protection time by location, UV Index from and UV Index to with 10 minutes accuracy. Optional altitide and ozone level could be provided.

tools.name: uv.getUv
tools.description: Get real-time UV Index by location. Optional altitude, ozone level and datetime could be provided.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
